OptionDescription.SourceString: Determines whether the timer is saved automatically on leaving a game and loaded automatically on rejoining. If SAVE AND CONTINUE the timer will continue running while the player has left, but completion behavior will be deferred until they rejoin.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: Determines whether the timer is saved automatically on leaving a game and loaded automatically on rejoining. If SAVE AND CONTINUE the timer will continue running while the player has left, but completion behavior will be deferred until they rejoin.
